title: EventEnvelope
description: Canonical event envelope on the NATS JetStream bus (ARCHITECTURE.md §6). Every event is published wrapped in an Envelope.

id.description: Event UUID. Consumers MUST dedupe on this (JetStream redelivers).

ts.description: When the event was produced (RFC 3339, UTC).

trace_id.description: OpenTelemetry trace id, so spans stitch across services.

subject.description: NATS subject carrying the entity id, e.g. 'task:1234'. Consumers order on this.

payload.description: Type-specific payload. Its shape is defined per event type in events.json.
